question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest average Evening Daily # in New York? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A lottery analyst is checking year-to-year shifts in evening draw values.

1.fact: Averaging Evening Daily # by draw year for 2005-2010, 2009 has the lowest average at 487.0631868131868.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest average Evening Daily # in New York? (Parse Draw Date to Year; compute the mean Evening Daily # by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Compute the average Evening Daily # by year (2005-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2009.
